- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent tests failed due to high-confidence infrastructure dependency (Docker unavailable). Task declares required infrastructure. Conditionally approved — independent tests skipped. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 1191 chars provided.
